text: Terrifying scenes from Gulshan-e-Iqbal block 13. The whole road is flooded, cars are floating. Need help ASAP! #KarachiRain #Flood
My family is stuck on the first floor in Gulshan, ground floor is completely submerged. Nobody is responding to calls! Praying for safety.
Never seen water levels this high in Gulshan-e-Iqbal. Avoid University Road at all costs. #Karachi
Is anyone sending rescue boats to Gulshan? People are literally drowning here.
Water entered our shops in Gulshan-e-Iqbal. Complete disaster.
Massive flooding in Gulshan near NIPA. Stay safe everyone.
It's an emergency in Gulshan-e-Iqbal, someone please tag the authorities. We need evacuation.
Urban flooding at its worst in Gulshan today. Everything is destroyed.
Oh my God! A 4-story building just collapsed in North Nazimabad Block H! Sending prayers.
Building collapse reported in North Nazimabad. Rescue teams rushing to the spot. Several feared trapped.
We need heavy machinery here in North Nazimabad NOW to move the debris. People are trapped!
Terrible news from North Nazimabad. Hoping everyone makes it out safe.
I can hear sirens going towards North Nazimabad. Must be for the collapsed building. #Karachi
Guys, it's not a flood in Gulshan. The main KWSB water line burst near NIPA causing all this water. Stop spreading panic.
Fake news about flooding. It's just a broken pipe in Gulshan-e-Iqbal block 13. I'm standing right here.
Water pipeline burst in Gulshan, that's why there's water. No flood.
I think I saw a UFO in the sky over Clifton today or maybe it was a drone.
Something huge is happening in the city. Everyone is running but I don't know where. Crazy vibes.
BREAKING: Severe urban flooding reported in Gulshan-e-Iqbal, Karachi. Authorities have declared an emergency in the district.
Live updates: Relief efforts underway as Gulshan-e-Iqbal faces massive flooding. PDMA requested to intervene.
